"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\bullet_demo.dir/objects.a

C:\Users\adria\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\MartinStorsjo.LLVM-MinGW.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\llvm-mingw-20260407-ucrt-x86_64\bin\clang++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\bullet_demo.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bullet_demo.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libbullet_demo.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\bullet_demo.dir\linkLibs.rsp
